overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a desert-edge urban residential area built into red rock hills, then transitioning to high-speed driving on an elevated highway toward a distant futuristic city skyline during golden hour.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with street barriers and red rock backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along sidewalk past pedestrians in a desert-edge urban area with buildings on the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue hair and yellow jacket walking in opposite direction
pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: multi-story concrete residential building with balconies and air conditioning units
metal barricades lining the edge of the sidewalk along the road
large reddish-brown rock cliff rising behind the urban structures

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a concrete sidewalk in an urban residential area at golden hour. Pedestrians pass by in the opposite direction, and metal barricades line the right side of the path. A massive red rock formation looms behind the concrete apartment buildings on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside residential shacks with graffiti-covered walls

events.description: turns left off main sidewalk into narrow residential hillside area with shacks built into the rock

agents.ego_description: turning left and navigating through narrow paths between hillside buildings and shacks

entered.detail: makeshift stilted shacks and structures built into the red rock hillside
large concrete retaining wall featuring murals including '666' with American flag pattern and 'Route 66' signage
abandoned dark-colored van or truck parked near red and white striped barriers

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a narrow hillside residential area where shacks are built into the red rock terrain. The path winds past a derelict vehicle and alongside a large concrete wall covered in murals, including a prominent Route 66 sign. The space is enclosed and devoid of other people.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with overpasses leading to city

events.description: transitions from walking to high-speed driving on the elevated highway
large digital billboard with purple advertisement becomes visible ahead on the right

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed along the elevated highway toward the distant city skyline, passing under multiple overpasses

entered.detail: smooth concrete barrier wall running along the left side of the highway
concrete highway overpass crossing perpendicular above the road
large illuminated billboard displaying purple and white advertisement with 'GET SOUL' text
futuristic city towers and skyscrapers visible through atmospheric haze in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to high-speed driving on an elevated highway bathed in golden hour sunlight. The camera speeds past concrete barriers and under multiple overpasses while a distant futuristic city skyline gradually emerges from the haze. A large digital billboard becomes prominent as the vehicle approaches the urban center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a slow walk through a red-rock residential district to a high-speed drive toward a futuristic metropolis. It begins on a concrete sidewalk at golden hour, moving past pedestrians and metal barricades beneath the shadow of a massive red rock formation. As the camera turns left, the open street narrows into a secluded hillside area where shacks are built directly into the terrain, winding past a derelict vehicle and a concrete wall adorned with murals and a Route 66 sign. The scene then shifts abruptly to the perspective of a vehicle accelerating along an elevated highway, speeding under overpasses and past concrete barriers. Finally, the horizon expands as a distant city skyline emerges from the haze, with a large digital billboard becoming prominent as the camera surges toward the urban center.
